title: Luxembourg City, Luxembourg Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Luxembourg City, Luxembourg Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Luxembourg City is a city in Luxembourg Canton with a population of 132,780. The wealthy capital of the Grand Duchy, home to EU institutions, a thriving financial sector, and a UNESCO-listed old town perched on dramatic cliffs.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
